---
title: "Varighet av plager"
author: "NNRR"
format:
  html:
    self-contained: true
---

```{r, echo=TRUE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
library(nnrr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

datoTil <- "2024-12-31"
datoFra <- "2022-01-01"

raadata <- nnrr::nnrrHentRegData(datoFra = datoFra, 
                                 datoTil = datoTil)

RegData <- raadata |>
  dplyr::filter(S1b_DateOfCompletion >= datoFra,
                S1b_DateOfCompletion <= datoTil,
                regstatus == 1,
                regstatus_pre == 1,
                regstatus_post == 1,
                regstatus_post2 == 1,
                PainDurationNow != "Ikke svart") |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    smertevarighet =ifelse(PainDurationNow == "Mer enn 2", 
                           "Smerter > 2 år", "Smerter <= 2 år"),
    i_jobb_el_studier = S2_Working | S2_Student,
    arbledig_el_hjem = S2_Unemployed | S2_StayAtHome,
    aap_el_ufor = S2_NAV | S2_Pension)


tab1 <- tableone::CreateTableOne(
  c("PatientAge", "PatientGender", "EducationLevel", 
    "FamilyStatus", "HSCL10Score", "FABQScore1", 
    "OdiScore", "PainExperiencesActivity", "i_jobb_el_studier", 
    "arbledig_el_hjem", "S2_SickLeave", "aap_el_ufor",
    "S2_RetirementPension", "NofPainRegions",
    "VentetidFraHenvisningTilBesok"),
  strata = "smertevarighet", 
  data = RegData,
  factorVars = c("PatientGender", "EducationLevel", 
                 "FamilyStatus", "i_jobb_el_studier",
                 "arbledig_el_hjem", "S2_SickLeave", 
                 "aap_el_ufor", "S2_RetirementPension"),
  addOverall = TRUE)

knitr::kable(print(tab1, printToggle = FALSE)[,-5])

```
